items.title: Blizzard live updates: Historic storm strikes with 3 inches an hour, thundersnow
items.description: The governors of New York and New Jersey have issued states of emergency, and thousands of flights have been canceled.

items.title: EU diplomats to meet Board of Peace director over Gaza's future
items.description: The European Union’s top diplomats are meeting with the director of the Board of Peace in Brussels

items.title: WATCH:  Snowmobilers rescue moose from deep snowbank
items.description: A group of snowmobilers helped free a moose stuck in a deep snowbank in northern New Hampshire.
